title: mentha arvensis var. distans
intro: Mentha arvensis var. distans, also known as wild mint or corn mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. distans include relief from nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
